goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'area'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the north
Make sure you get price range
